text: hey are we still doing dinner at home tonight or did you want to go out?
let's just stay in, I'm exhausted after the Reykjanes flux survey. can you grab some skyr and bread on the way back?
already on it 😄 getting Lily her lactose-free milk too
Mum are we still doing dinner Sunday at Grandpa Harold's? Was thinking I could bring that pasta salad
Yes!! Dad's doing a roast so don't worry about bringing anything, just come hungry 😄 make sure the salad is lactose-free for you though
Ok perfect, around 4? 🙂
Hey sweetheart, just checking in. Haven't heard from you in a few days, everything okay up there?
Hi Dad! Sorry, work's been crazy with the Katla chapter. I'm good though! How's your back feeling?
Much better thanks for asking. Call me this weekend when you get a chance, I'd love to hear about the field campaign 😊
Auntie Martha just checking in, how did the geography exam go??
Oliver!! Was waiting to hear 😊 tell me everything, how do you think it went?
honestly not too bad, I remembered all the volcano stuff you taught me lol thank you!!
Marco, did the Etna MultiGAS data make it onto the EU-VGAS portal? Want to compare with our Reykjanes CO2 flux before Tuesday's call
Ciao Martha! Yes, uploaded last night. The SO2 ratios look interesting, we should discuss on the partner call 🌋
Perfect. I'll bring the DOAS retrievals too. Talk Tuesday!
Hey Martha! How are things at Reykjanes? Saw the tremor swarm reports 🌋
All under control for now! Still planning the San Francisco conference in November? Would love to catch up in person
Definitely going! Let's grab dinner there. Miss you, we need a proper PNVO-ÍJE catch-up soon!
hey are we still doing dinner at home tonight or did you want to go out?
let's just stay in, I'm exhausted after the Reykjanes flux survey. can you grab some skyr and bread on the way back?
Derek can you get Lily from school? EU-VGAS call ran over.
Krýsuvík numbers up ~15%, instrument or real? Checking retrieval.
Joint campaign data synced to Dropbox 👍
Harold's arthritis flaring, got him to the doctor.
Reykjanes SO2 steady today, no change on the DOAS scans.
Platform milestone review Dec 11, sending agenda.
Annual Iceland visit — May work for you?
Bitcoin's up, told you 😄 not adding more though.
Harold sounded tired on the call, Craig's checking in tomorrow.
Etna comparison plots ready for the paper.
PNVO wants your DOAS protocol, ok to share?
Oliver asking when Lily visits Akureyri.
Pizza night still on? Lily wants the one from Hlemmur Mathöll.
Good talk in SF? Rotorua keynote draft when you can.
